news.t: Friday's SpaceX IPO Was Bad News for Space Stocks. These Experts Thinks They Can Rise Again
Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
Global X Launches Space Tech ETF as Industry Transitions to Commercial Exploration

holdings.infoBox: ORBX is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rocket Lab stock at 19.68%, AST SpaceMobile at 10.11%, Planet Labs PBC at 8.43%, Globalstar at 5.42%, and York Space Systems at 5.29%.

overview.description: The Global X Space Tech ETF (ORBX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X Space Tech index. The fund aims to provide pure-play access to the space technology value chain. The ETF tracks a narrow index of stocks globally tied to the space tech theme ORBX was launched on Apr 14, 2026 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Friday's SpaceX IPO Was Bad News for Space Stocks. These Experts Thinks They Can Rise Again
data.text: SpaceX's trading debut knocked space stocks out of the stratosphere. Some experts say they can rise again.

data.title: Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
data.text: The rise of dedicated space ETFs is a relatively recent development. For years, investors seeking exposure to the space economy were largely limited to broad aerospace and defense funds.

data.title: ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
data.text: Kirsten Chang, senior industry analyst at VettaFi, joined Nate Geraci on this week's ETF Prime to discuss the relentless pace of new ETF launches in 2026. The industry has launched nearly 370 new ETFs...

data.title: Global X Launches Space Tech ETF as Industry Transitions to Commercial Exploration
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Global X announces the launch of the Global X Space Tech ETF (ORBX), designed to provide pure-play exposure to companies in the space economy.
